title: Execution Ownership Reset
content: Assign a single accountable owner to each of the top 3 strategic initiatives.
measurable_outcome: 100% of active strategic initiatives have one named accountable owner; initiative slippage ≤ 66% next quarter.

title: Leadership Intervention Audit
content: Document instances where leadership intervened operationally in the past 30 days.
measurable_outcome: Reduce leadership unplanned intervention frequency to occasional or lower.

title: Decision Escalation Protocol
content: Define escalation thresholds for decisions exceeding 5 business days.
measurable_outcome: Average decision cycle time ≤ 5 business days.

title: Leadership Capacity Allocation Model
content: Reallocate executive time toward forward-looking initiatives.
measurable_outcome: ≥ 60% of leadership time allocated to strategic initiatives.

title: Initiative Reduction Mandate
content: Reduce active strategic initiatives to no more than three.
measurable_outcome: ≤ 3 active initiatives; slippage reduced by ≥ 33% next quarter.

title: Strategic Clarity Brief
content: Create a one-page strategic priority brief circulated company-wide.
measurable_outcome: Decision cycle time ≤ 7 days for priority-aligned initiatives.

title: Quarterly Initiative Scorecard
content: Implement measurable milestones for each strategic initiative.
measurable_outcome: ≥ 66% of strategic milestones delivered on time.

title: Strategic Review Cadence Installation
content: Establish recurring quarterly strategic review session.
measurable_outcome: Strategic initiative slippage ≤ 33% across two consecutive quarters.

title: Workflow Bottleneck Mapping
content: Identify top 3 execution bottlenecks affecting delivery timelines.
measurable_outcome: Decision cycle time reduced by ≥ 20% within 60 days.

title: Weekly Execution Review
content: Install structured weekly review focused on strategic execution progress.

title: Decision SLA Policy
content: Implement internal SLA for high-impact decisions.
measurable_outcome: Average decision cycle time ≤ 5 business days.

title: Execution Metrics Dashboard
content: Publish dashboard tracking initiative status and decision latency.
measurable_outcome: Leadership intervention frequency reduced to occasional or lower.

title: Accountability Alignment Reset
content: Clarify accountability boundaries across leadership layers.
measurable_outcome: Leadership unplanned intervention reduced by ≥ 30% next quarter.

title: Decision Transparency Log
content: Create shared decision log accessible across management.

title: Initiative Ownership Visibility
content: Publish initiative owners and status internally.

title: Execution Discipline Standard
content: Codify execution expectations into written operating standard.
